channel.title: !DrawSplat
channel.description: DrawSplatTM related blog posts - Visit DrawSplat.org

item.title: DrawSplat Feature: Mermaid Diagram Studio
item.description: I remember when I first encountered Mermaid diagrams. The challenge? Generating the Mermaid syntax so that it would work in a Mermaid rendering engine. For whatever the reason, any code I put toget…

item.title: Comparing Codex and Code: DrawSplat
item.description: A while back, I started working on a vibe-coded solution, DrawSplat. I started the project on a lark to see how far a non-programmer could go. I started in Claude back when I was paying $20 a month…

item.title: Vibe-Coding: Castles and Catapults game #AI #FREE
item.description: When I was a thirteen year old in high school, one of my favorite things to do was to visit the computer lab. It was full of TRS-80s, and one of the few games available was, “Castles and Cata…

item.title: DrawSplat Feature: Concept Map Studio
item.description: There’s a lot to like about DrawSplat, a free interactive whiteboard, as you can see from this concept map below. While you can access DrawSplat’s concept map tool inside the whiteboard…

item.title: Introducing DrawSplat, A Free #Whiteboard Plus Solution
item.description: When I started down this road, I wanted teachers, gasping for tools that aren’t stuffed with Gen AI features, to have access to fun tools they could use with their students. The job didn̵…
